title: The Tempo of the Hunt
description: The Tempo is delighted the trail was wrong about the party's speed. This isn't a threat — it's a game. Don't let it catch you.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: Track me first. Find where I've been. Then we'll see if you can find where I am.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: You're faster than the trail suggested. I like it when the trail is wrong.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: Don't let me catch you. That's not a threat. That's the game.
